economic_notes: Cote Market Development Inc. (wholly-owned, modified equity method) generated net income of $131,582 on revenue of $3,741,873. PHC Holdings Limited Partnership (14.28% interest, cost method). Duck Mountain Resorts Limited Partnership and related entities consolidated. COVID-19 impacted operations in 2020-2021.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2021 but auditor's report is dated February 13, 2024 - significant lag between year-end and audit completion. Emphasis of Matter paragraph notes claims against Government of Canada with loans taken to fund negotiations, secured by insurance. Cote Legacy Trust and Cote Onakawek Trust are NOT consolidated as they are controlled by independent trustees. Cote Market Development Inc. accounted for under modified equity method (GBE). Five entities fully consolidated: Cote First Nation CMHC Housing, Cote Resources Ltd., Duck Mountain Resorts Limited Partnership, Duck Mountain Resorts Ltd., Cote Developments Ltd. and Cote Developments Limited Partnership. Duck Mountain entities have December 31 year-end (non-coterminous). Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNIHB + CMHC + Government of Saskatchewan = 11,658,803 + 3,023,446 + 499,899 + 409,674 = 15,591,822. Public Health Agency of Canada recorded as negative revenue (-11,860). Deferred revenue increased significantly to $11.27M.
